rationale: Educ. Code §11.1513 governs school district employment policies and personnel selection. It is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 11.1513. EMPLOYMENT POLICY. (a) The board of trustees of each independent school district shall adopt a policy providing for the employment and duties of district personnel.
_note: No conflict. The rule text concerns school district employment policy and has no bearing on homestead exemption amounts.
